creator: amdmi3@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 173968
Patch

Requesting exp-run to test this patch. Actually, only CONFIGURE_ARGS modification is expected to cause any problems. Though even old configure scripts support --disable-silent-rules and configure does ignore unknown arguments so even if it doesn't support --disable-silent-rules adding it shouldn't break the build, you can never be sure with autotools, so exp-run is required. It may also reveal some misuses of GNU_CONFIGURE.
